testcase.name: test_respects_num_rows_10
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_scheme_generate.py:186: in test_respects_num_rows_10 assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_save_scheme_works

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='mi-learning-hub.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)

testcase.failure:
